_rules.names: Use guesty_display_name verbatim. Never render discouraged names.

banned.hot_tub: NO DLJ unit has a hot tub per Owner 2026-04-17 09:38 ET. Mountain Retreat explicitly does NOT have one. Do not write 'hot tub' or 'jacuzzi' claims for any listing unless Owner reverses.

discouraged_names.Little Joy Lodge: Legacy Airbnb vanity slug only (/h/littlejoylodge -> Unit Y). NOT a current display title. Never render in user-facing content.
discouraged_names.Pikes Peak Retreat: Truncated/stale form of Unit W — true name is 'Pikes Peak Boutique Retreat'. Never render.
discouraged_names.BrightStar Boutique: Truncated/stale form of Unit X — true name is 'Pikes Peak BrightStar Boutique'. Never render.
discouraged_names.Direct View Tiny Home: Self-sanctioned short form of Unit Y. Unit Y has NO sanctioned short form (unit_policy.short_form_sanctioned=false). Use full Guesty/Airbnb title verbatim until Owner rules.
discouraged_names.Pikes Peak Tiny Home: Generic/ambiguous — could match any of the 4 CO units. Use the specific Guesty/Airbnb display name.

_rules.no_ai_disclosure: NEVER mention AI/agents/automation tech. Sell benefits: 60-sec response, 24/7 coverage, 5-star hosting.
_rules.colorado_only: Miami NEVER appears on this site.
